title: Competitive benchmarking against Magma/Sage/AFF3CT
description:
Conduct rigorous performance benchmarking of gf2 against established systems:

## Benchmark targets

| System | Domain | Comparison areas |
|--------|--------|-----------------|
| **Magma / Sage** | Binary field operations, polynomial arithmetic | GF(2^m) element arithmetic, polynomial operations |
| **AFF3CT / IT++** | FEC decoder performance | LDPC, BCH, polar code throughput |
| **fflas-ffpack** | Finite field linear algebra | Matrix multiply, Gaussian elimination, inversion, linear solve over GF(p) and GF(2^m) |

## Methodology

- Criterion.rs benchmarks with statistical rigor
- Competitors built with optimal flags (`-O3 -march=native`, OpenBLAS for fflas-ffpack)
- Same hardware, same input data, median of 100+ iterations
- Published results with full methodology documentation

## Goals

- Within 2× of Magma/Sage for field arithmetic; exceed on SIMD operations
- Within 2× of fflas-ffpack for GF(p) linear algebra; **exceed** for GF(2^m) (direct PCLMULQDQ vs float-BLAS detour)
- Competitive with AFF3CT for FEC decoder throughput
- Identify optimization targets from any gaps
